case_title: DELORIS LOGAN VS. JOHN MICHAEL MCKENNY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-29-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-19-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
